name: citability-parity-sample
description: Static golden fixture used to detect large regressions in the citability scorer. The expected score was computed from the deterministic TypeScript heuristic; it should stay within ±5 points as the algorithm is refined.

pageData.title: How to optimize for AI search
pageData.metaDescription: A practical guide to making your content quotable by AI search engines.

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: How to optimize for AI search

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: AI search engines quote concise, self-contained passages. This guide explains how to structure content so it is easy for models to cite.

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: A study found that 68% of AI overviews include at least one external citation. Pages that provide clear, factual paragraphs are more likely to be referenced by language models.

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: Start with a direct answer. Include statistics or examples. Use headings every 300 words. Keep paragraphs under 80 words. Add a summary sentence.

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: Models favor paragraphs that answer a question in the first sentence and then provide supporting context. Aim for 40 to 80 words per paragraph.

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text:
Tactic Impact
Direct answer High
Statistics Medium
Examples High

headings.text: How to optimize for AI search
How to optimize for AI search

contentBlocks.text: By making your content direct, structured and evidence-based, you increase the chance that AI systems quote it. Start with one page and measure the change.
